title: Define Wave 33 manager assignment media evidence contract
description: Extend architecture docs with the manager assignment evidence contract, including file categories, upload/list metadata, assignment detail UI states, authorization boundaries, and recovery semantics for upload failures or unsupported files.
acceptance_criteria: Assignment evidence contract documents upload and list semantics without breaking Wave 31 and Wave 32 assignment detail contracts
UI state map covers empty, picking, uploading, success, unsupported-file, forbidden, unauthorized, and failed-upload states
Module ownership and API boundary for assignment evidence media are explicit and additive to current manager assignment workflows
